author: somnergy
content:
We made an [interim release ](https://github.com/erigontech/zilkworm/releases/tag/v0.1.0-alpha.2-ere) with ready ere-benchmarks support: 

A follow-up PR would be created on eth-act/zkevm-benchmark-workload with [this commit ](https://github.com/erigontech/zkevm-benchmark-workload/commit/3b3b95fec894f211607c547d7d36fa3b136d40da)

Highlights: 
- zilkworm's codebase has all the support necessary for the workload side to directly run the benchmark
- the custom input version (soon to be replaced) has a custom rust script also readily integrated

Further coordination and easy instructions coming soon. Adding <@745384946310578317> who worked on this.

author: somnergy
content:
<@944007601400741989> We can discuss further on this. Sharing what <@745384946310578317> shared internally some time ago on this (comparison to reth).

```
Metric | Value
-- | --
Comparable fixtures | 940 / 940
Zilkworm wins | 785 (83.5%)
Reth wins | 155 (16.5%)
Total cycles, Reth | 278,152,233,848
Total cycles, Zilkworm | 142,815,715,725
Aggregate speedup | 1.95× in Zilkworm's favor

```

author: somnergy
content: This only has sp1 hypercube support at the moment
